title_en: The benchmark for modern daiginjo, polished to 23%.
subtitle: The benchmark for modern daiginjo, polished to 23%.
body:
Dassai 23 is the flagship of Asahi Shuzo in Yamaguchi, made with Yamada Nishiki rice polished down to 23%. The result is an intensely fragrant sake with notes of apple, banana, and lychee, yet a crisp, clean finish.

This sake revolutionised the industry by proving that high polishing could produce a consistent, fruit‑forward style that appeals globally. It is best enjoyed slightly chilled.
